name: Okendo
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can integrate Okendo reviews and ratings with Merchandising Cloud to display comprehensive customer feedback on product cards throughout your search and collection pages. This integration brings detailed review data into the product discovery experience, helping customers evaluate products based on verified customer experiences."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Okendo integration provides rich review data that supports more informed purchasing decisions by surfacing customer feedback during product browsing. By displaying ratings, review counts, and review highlights on product cards, you help customers assess product quality and suitability more quickly, which can help improve conversion rates and reduce returns through better purchase alignment."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Our Native Shopify App, built using the Liquid language, allows for seamless integration with various review services, including Okendo. This guide will walk you through the steps to integrate Okendo into your Maropost Merchandising Cloud (formerly Findify) setup on Shopify."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To start, you must have already downloaded the Okendo app from the\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://apps.shopify.com/okendo-reviews", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Shopify App Store."}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/CGMO7JEQ8COZ/55d1bdd-okendo.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/CGMO7JEQ8COZ/55d1bdd-okendo.png", "name": "55d1bdd-Okendo.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 192374, "width": 667, "height": 813, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "downloadUrl": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FCGMO7JEQ8COZ%2F55d1bdd-okendo.png", "mediaID": 1169, "dateInserted": "2025-10-22T20:33:20+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\n"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Step 1: Enable the Okendo App in Your Theme"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "First, ensure that the Okendo app is enabled in your Shopify theme. You can do this by following these steps:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Go to your Shopify Admin panel."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to\u00a0"}, {"text": "Apps", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0and find the Okendo app."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Follow the instructions to install and enable the app in your Shopify store."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Step 2: Add Okendo Widget to Product Card"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To display Okendo reviews on your product cards, you need to add the Okendo widget code to the\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-product-card.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0file in your theme."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Go to\u00a0"}, {"text": "Online Store", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0>\u00a0"}, {"text": "Themes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Click on\u00a0"}, {"text": "Actions", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0>\u00a0"}, {"text": "Edit code", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0for the theme you are using."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "In the\u00a0"}, {"text": "Sections", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0folder, find and open the\u00a0"}, {"text": "findify-product-card.liquid", "code": true}, {"text": "\u00a0file."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "
"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Step 3: Verify the Integration"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "After adding the widget code, ensure that the integration is working correctly:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Go to your storefront and navigate to a product page."}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"text": "Check if the Okendo reviews are displayed correctly on the product cards."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Customizing the Reviews Display"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can further customize the appearance of the Okendo reviews by adding custom CSS to your theme's stylesheet. Adjust the styling to match your store's design preferences."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "By following these steps, you can seamlessly integrate Okendo reviews into your store, enhancing your customers' shopping experience with valuable review information directly on product cards."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For further assistance or inquiries, feel free to contact us at\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:support@maropost.com", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "support@maropost.com"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
